title: Galaxy Quest
description: Galaxy Quest is a modpack based around Ad Astra and a plethora of modified tech mods and custom made items featuring over 120 quests to guide your progress.
body:
## ![GalaxyQuest header text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b154a430c1816021a111477bf3d49b71f94140b.png)
Remember the old Moon Quest or Mars Quest series on YouTube? Remember those old Space Race modpacks? No? Just me?

Galaxy Quest is a modpack based around Ad Astra and a plethora of modified tech mods and custom made items featuring over 120 quests to guide your progress. With progression tightly tied to Ad Astra, you're sure to need to spend an ample amount of time on Ad Astra's planets.

Make complex contraptions with Create, huge reactors with Extreme Reactors, and mind-boggling resource processing with Mekanism and Industrial Foregoing! Conquer the Earth, and then the Galaxy!

Check out the Release 1.0.0 notes for a full list of mods used in the pack, and important changes made from the 'vanilla' versions of the mods.

Huge thanks to my friends who playtested early versions of the pack for me and found lots of issues for me to fix!

Credits:
- [Gravestone Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod/files)
- [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)

## FAQ
Q: I am using Prism, why is my game crashing saying something about paxels?

A: For some reason, PaxelJS doesn't seem to get imported all the time into Prism. Please manually add that mod.

Q: Ok, I did that, but now it is saying I have the wrong version of Cucumber Lib?

A: Make sure you ONLY have Cucumber Library 7.0.7 installed. Sometimes Prism will install 7.0.7 and a newer version. Please delete the newer version.

Q: How can I make a multiplayer server with this pack?

A: Simply make your forge server the same way you would with any server pack, but remove oculus and embeddium from the mods folder. You may have to specify a port for the Voice Chat mod as well in the appropriate config.
